reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención.  Los sanguches son exquisitos y mucha variedad.
Los baños de mujeres impecables, Super limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. The sandwiches are delicious and there's a great variety.
The women's restrooms are spotless, super clean.

reviews.comment:
Estacion de servicio chica con muy buena atención, todos muy amables, baños limpios, lugar para hacer picnics, con adadores, bajo la sombra de arboles con mesitas, con confiteria y kiosko.

(Translated by Google)
Small gas station with very good service, everyone is very friendly, clean bathrooms, place to have picnics, with grills, under the shade of trees with small tables, with a confectionery and kiosk.

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Lugar con mucho verde afuera, baños limpios con jabón y toallas de papel. Ni parece una estación de servicio. Lo único para mejorar debieran tener Wifi

(Translated by Google)
A place with lots of greenery outside, clean restrooms with soap and paper towels. It doesn't even look like a gas station. The only thing that could be improved is the addition of Wi-Fi.

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio pequeña, con desvío por la ruta 9 vieja, desde la Autopista COR-ROS. EL horario de atención para su salón es bastante limitado.

(Translated by Google)
Small gas station, accessible via the old Route 9 from the COR-ROS Highway. Its service area has quite limited hours.
